searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Search terms to run on Apple Maps, e.g. 'coffee shops in Prague' or 'dentists near 90210'. Each query produces up to maxResultsPerQuery results.

startUrls.title: Direct Apple Maps URLs
startUrls.description: Direct maps.apple.com URLs to scrape instead of search queries.

maxResultsPerQuery.title: Max results per query
maxResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum number of places returned per search query.

locale.title: Language / locale
locale.description: Language code passed to Apple Maps API (e.g. en-US, fr-FR, de-DE). Affects result language.

countryCode.title: Country code
countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for proxy geo-targeting. Drives which geographic results Apple Maps returns.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential proxies strongly recommended. Datacenter IPs are often blocked by Apple Maps. Proxy country determines geographic result bias.
